operations.command:
git add .planning/phases/06-credit-bis-data/06-RESEARCH.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
docs(06): add deep dive research

Phase 6: Credit & BIS Data - Extended Research
- BIS SDMX API: dimension codes, sdmx1 patterns, Eurodollar query
- SLOOS: 639 series catalog, interpretation guide, key series
- Credit issuance: Finnhub TRACE API, FRED spreads as proxy
- Funding stress: LIBOR transition, RFR-based spreads, CCBS sources

Key findings:
- BIS LBS captures ~95% of cross-border banking ($19T USD claims)
- SLOOS is leading indicator (tightening precedes recessions 6-12mo)
- No free CCBS data - use SOFR-EFFR spread as proxy
- Finnhub TRACE requires premium subscription

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
